name: Square Off (Heavy)
note: Default straight sword skill. Low FP, high poise damage.

name: Lion's Claw
note: Somersault slam. Massive poise damage. Available from Fort Haight.

name: Flame of the Redmanes
note: Fastest poise break in the game. 2 casts staggers most bosses.

name: Hoarfrost Stomp
note: AoE frost. Trivializes early bosses. Still strong late.

name: Bloody Slash
note: Fast bleed burst. Self-damage. Available Stormveil.

name: Glintstone Pebble (AoW)
note: Pebble + thrust combo. Great on thrusting swords.

name: Gravitas
note: AoE pull + magic damage. Seaside Ruins.

name: Wild Strikes
note: Per-hit in flurry. 6-8 hits per use. Great with status buildup.

name: Royal Knight's Resolve
note: +80% damage on next attack. Massive with charged R2.

name: Seppuku
note: Self-bleed for +30 bleed buildup, +12.5% AR. Stacks with Occult.

name: Determination
note: +60% damage on next attack. Available immediately.
